transcript.text:
Hello everyone!
Today, I prepared a course meal with sweet and salty dishes
These foods were in trend on social media
Donut chicken burgers
And here, it is Aussie Cheese Fries,
but I put Oh! Gamja (a potato-flavored snack) instead of French fries
?? : Hello!!
Tzuyang: Hello!
??: Oh!!
Superstar Kim Yong Myeong: We are going to eat sweet and salty food, so I brought it!!
There is no better thing than this sweet and salty food!
Kim Yong Myeong is a Kwangdong CF model.
I saw this a lot in the advertisements!
No, but if I see you too much from the side, hahaha
He has an aura of a middle-aged woman
(Giggles)

I brought you bottles of corn silk tea since you eat too much sweet-salty food
Corn silk tea is also good for sweet-salty food
Those products are shipped directly by the CF model (rejecting rejection)
Normally, what is that?
Normally...
You're acting like I'm your mother
Tzuyang!!!
Sweet-salty (x3), ah really! (nagging)
What's the name of this dish?
This is Aussie cheese fries
Normally we put French fries but I put Oh! Gamja
Kim: Oh! Gamja? It is also sweet-salty, right?
Cheddar cheese is also salty, right? Ohh!
How much do you eat, Tzuyang?
Me? I can probably eat everything here on my own
You can eat all of this?!

Oh then you needed the corn silk tea for the sweet-salty food
Ah of course
It is boring to just eat, so do you wanna play a game with me?
I don't know whether this battle can be done.
So if I eat one sweet-salty food,
I discussed with the advertisers
Each time you eat one food, you will take home 10 corn silk tea
Alright
I'm starting to sweat already
Bon Appetit
*Round 1: Donut Burger & Aussie Cheese Fries Rule: 1 Donut Burger = 10 Corn Silk Tea
This is huge
I want to watch her eat
It tastes better than I thought
It's honestly very sweet and salty
You're right

I need something to wash it down
*Balancing it out
I will show you how to drink it
There's a way
You see the logo, right?
You drank it like this just now You can't do this
Hold it like this
Just like that
I think I can do better
You need to do an expression
Do I say "Wa"?
*Just watch
What is this? All the sweetness and saltiness are going away!
Sweetness and Saltiness! Get it away with Corn Silk Beverage
You're so good at eating though
I think mine is a rear drumstick And hers is the front drumstick

*Not True
How does a chicken have a "rear" and a "front" drumstick?
Oh, right
It tastes better than expected
It's only my second one
How did you like your first one?
Oh you're still eating your first one
[inaudible]
You have 0 points right now, right?
Not anymore
Players win on the second-half of the game
I'm currently analyzing Tzuyang's strategy
So you'll start eating now?
Yes, starting now...
A runaway train...
Drinking it like a commercial again

How can you
Eat more
Finishing up my last one
You only have 10 points right now, right?
10? You mean 20!
You didn't finish that one
Okay fine
We have film this like a commercial, right?
I've done it before
*The mom
*Mom trying to get a different role
Corn Silk Tea
*Next
Hey Tzuyang!
Look at you
We have chicken feet and cheese fondue for the 2nd round

Are you good with spicy food?
Of course
1 Chicken Feet equals to 5 Corn Silk Tea right?
Yes
*Round 2: Chicken Feet & Cheese Fondue Rule: 1 Chicken Feet = 5 Corn Silk Tea
*It's here (The Spiciness)
Corn Silk Tea to wash the spiciness away
You stopped it right when it was about to overflow
Pour vertically!
I think anybody can do this
I mean, yeah it's not a hard task
You have to eat this fast because of the spiciness
No, eat it slow to digest everything
You're good at eating
Wait a minute
Why is there a dog here?

I have rights too Who are you calling a dog?
You are violating my human rights!
I'm a human being and she called me a dog!
I've been filming with her for an hour
And she calls me a dog!
Doesn't that violate my human rights?
I'm going to call the National Human Rights Welfare Center
I just heard something weird from her stomach
I don't even know about it
Did you put an integrated-circuit or something in there? To help you digest
Can I please take this off?
Ms. Tzuyang
Do you know what Corn Beard is?
You don't?
Legendary Doctor Hur Jun used Corn Beard to make herbal medicines
It was back in our ancestor days

I, Hur Jun,
For the nation's health,
For the peace of our citizens,
For those drinking a lot of alcohol and eating a lot of sweet & salty food
I will prescribed you Corn Beard which is good for edema (swelling) and cooling down fever
Just like that
*What just happened?
I was surprised at first
Maybe you were out of your mind because it was too spicy
You can't just keep eating
You can start acting
You can do what I just did
Action!
Why are you shocked?
It's easier for me to react to your acting
Okay, I'm sorry I'll do it again

*(Reciting Hur Jun lines as Tzu Jun)
*2nd Fuel
Challenge accepted!
You'll get scolded if you do this at home
My wife will slap me
My belly wasn't this big before this mukbang
*So spicy
I will finish this for you
*Since Tzuyang is suffering from the spiciness
I can eat it
*Okay good
Is she going to eat it!?
*Shoving it in
That's amazing
Wait a minute
Did anyone keep count?

*Yong Myung ate 40 Tzuyang ate 67
Mother
When did you come here?
Yong Myung~
Last menu
You had macarons before, right?
This stuff is super sweet Yes, very sweet
*Round 3: Macaron Rule: 1 Macaron = 10 Corn Silk Tea
If you eat the SALT macaron without us knowing, then you get 50 bottles of Corn Silk Tea
I will eat the green grape one first Me too~
Actually, strawberry
Like that?
Yummy~
That looks so good on you
First time seeing someone that looks this good with this wig
You should definitely go for this look after you get old

I don't want to do this hairstyle
Hold on!
This macaron looks very strange
Let's see
This is so obvious
I can smell the ocean
*Fail
Spit it out
This is not edible!
I will give you 10 of my corn silk tea if you can do it
I will eat the untouched part
Pass!
When it's salty, drink the corn silk tea!
So salty!!!
Really haha
You're supposed to put a little bit

Mom, stop eating
Stop eating for the sake of your kids
Stop eating!
Let go!
You eat a lot of food but not macarons, right?
Yeah I don't really do a lot of dessert mukbangs
I'm not good at eating sweet stuff
But this is sweet
People like me shouldn't do mukbangs, right?
It's not suitable
You're the best
What is the result of our battle?
I'm curious
You got a total of 218 bottles
And Tzuyang got a total of 545 bottles
545!?

You can drink that all year
I can seriously drink this for a whole year
We ate sweet and salty food today
We were able to get through it thanks to the Corn Silk Tea
You do not need to worry about the aftermath at the toilet
Because like Tzuyang and I have said before
This really balances everything out
It was so fun today
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
